title: Sculk Virus
description: The player will be able to get infected with a strange sculk virus. The virus will evolve and eventually give different buffs and debuffs. Is it a gift or a virus? It's up to you.
body:
# Virus
## Stage 1
The player receives particles and a darkness effect every 8 minutes
## Stage 2
The player receives the mining fatigue effect
The effect of darkness every 8 minutes
Lives are reduced to 9
## Stage 3
The player receives the slowness effect
The effect of weakness every 10 minutes
Lives are reduced to 8
## Stage 4
Lives are reduced to 7
The player receives one of three debuffs
1. Water causes damage to the player
2. The shield imposes a nausea effect and totem of undying imposes a hunger effect on the player
3. All the arrows disappear from the player and because of this he cannot shoot
## Stage 5
All lives are returned to the player
Slowness,weakness and mining fatigue remove from the player
The player gets the hero of the village effect
## Stage 6
The player gets one of the five buffs and its particles
The potion that treats the virus does not work on the player
1. The player recovers lives from damage
2. When running, the player accelerates and takes less damage
3. The player gets the effect of fire resistance and resistance
4. The player gets 4 extra lives and a resistance and regeneration effect if an infected player or a warden is next to him
5. The player gets the effect dolphins grace and conduit power
# Crafts
## How to craft items
To craft items, you need to take one item in the main hand and the second item in the second hand
## Virus Potion
It needs an echo shard and a potion, an explosive potion or an arrow
## A Healing Potion
It needs an echo shard and a golden apple or enchanted golden apple and arrow
The antidote cures the virus
## The antidote
It needs heart of the sea and sculk catalyst
The antidote cures the virus and gives it immunity
## A reset Potion
He needs a golden apple and a enchanted golden apple.
The potion changes the debuff of 4 stages
